title: MDA for Virome Analysis
author: Frej Larsen
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.b42uqyew
materials: Place materials that tolerate UV-treatment in fume hood and turn on the UV light and recirculation for 30 minutes before use.
Denature template DNA by 95 degrees for 3 minutes in a ThermoCycler. Directly after, put the samples back on ice

steps.title: Pick up a bucket of ice...
steps.instruction: Pick up a bucket of ice and thaw samples on ice

steps.title: Add 10 ng DNA in 10...
steps.instruction: Add 10 ng DNA in 10 µL MQ water to the PCR tube and mix by pipetting. If sample has a concentration below 1 ng/ul, add 10 µL of undiluted sample to the tube and mix by pipetting

steps.title: Add 10 µL denaturation buffer to a PCR tube
steps.instruction: Add 10 µL denaturation buffer to a PCR tube

steps.title: Add all 20 µL sample content...
steps.instruction: Add all 20 µL sample content to the MDA cake tube. Keep both sample and cake on ice while transfering the sample

steps.title: Seal tube with provided lid and briefly centrifuge the sample
steps.instruction: Seal tube with provided lid and briefly centrifuge the sample

steps.title: Run sample on a ThermoCycler with the following program
steps.instruction: Run sample on a ThermoCycler with the following program: 30 °C for 00:30:00 65 °C for 00:10:00 4 °C

steps.title: Purify samples with bead purification or...
steps.instruction: Purify samples with bead purification or store sample at -20 °C or -80 °C
